title: Shadowed handoff singleton: running pnpm check
body: Shadowed Glimmering Moth / codex / GPT-5 / 019e5d is running the session-handoff singleton pnpm check after handoff-doc validation. Current facts before start: Shadowed active claims [], active commit queue [], handoff edits limited to repo-continuity/thread/napkin plus coordination state already written. Will broadcast result and stop; not opening implementation lane.
